title: Disenchant Curses
description: Remove curses from books and gear with a grindstone as you would with any other enchant
body: # Disenchant Curses ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loaders-Fabric/Quilt/NeoForge-darkmagenta?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Versions-1.21.x_|_26.1.x_|_26.2.x-darkmagenta?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environments-Server-darkmagenta?style=for-the-badge) ### Remove curses from books and gear with a grindstone as you would with any other enchant! - **Ability to remove `Curse of Binding` and `Curse of Vanishing` from any piece of gear or enchanted book** - **Experience points are also rewarded when disenchanting a curse just like any other enchants** - **Functions completely server-side and can be used in singleplayer** #### For any issues or feature requests, please make a report on [GitHub](https://github.com/CoolAid48/Disenchant-Curses/issues) [](https://ko-fi.com/coolaid48) [](https://discord.gg/J2SGshKNah) [](https://www.twitch.tv/coolaid48) ## Looking for a server host? ![server hosting partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e85210a65b7c17998987c57b7571ba2fbd19bfb.png)
